content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed additive fixture at src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs (688 lines) and mod.rs registration. The fixture correctly assembles a Ready-state milestone with plan artifacts, a 3-bead graph with mixed parent_child/blocks dependencies, and pre-configured MockBrAdapter/MockBvAdapter responses — all via existing builders with no modifications to existing infrastructure. Smoke test passes in well under 1s, all 1064 existing lib tests still pass, cargo check is clean, and the new file introduces no clippy warnings. The 27 pre-existing clippy errors in other files exist identically on master and are out of scope for this bead. Mock response ordering, dependency lookups, and serialized schemas (issue_type, dependency type: parent_child/blocks, BeadPriority as integer) all line up with the downstream BeadSummary/BeadDetail/DependencyRef deserializers. No real bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
